parameters.text:
=⏭️ *AUTOREFINEMENT SKIPPED*

*Agent:* {{ $json.agent_id }}
*Reason:* Generated fix too short or prompt would exceed limits

*Dominant Pattern:* {{ $json.dominant_pattern }}
*Fix Length:* {{ $json.prompt_addition.length }} chars
*Would-be Prompt Length:* {{ $json.updated_prompt_length }} chars

_Manual review recommended._

parameters.responseBody:
={
  "status": "success",
  "action": "fix_applied",
  "agent_id": "{{ $('Extract Fix from Response').item.json.agent_id }}",
  "pattern_fixed": "{{ $('Extract Fix from Response').item.json.dominant_pattern }}",
  "rerun_invocation_id": "{{ $json.invocation_id || 'pending' }}",
  "timestamp": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}"
}

meta.purpose: Autorefinement orchestrator for ElevenLabs voice agent testing
meta.integration: Works with native-test-runner.json to form complete testing loop
